description: Auditor binding spec for ISO/IEC 42001 A.6 'AI-System Recording of Event Logs' integrity re-derivation. Binds output type 'log_chain_head_digest' to the verifier-side primitive 'iso42001_log_chain_head_recompute' (SHA-256 hash-chain fold over the ordered events, genesis pinned in the primitive) under the 'exact' comparator (hex-string equality). The chaining rule is AUTHORITY-PINNED via the primitive_id; a producer cannot substitute a weaker digest rule without changing the primitive_id, which the auditor's SHA-pinned spec rejects. Re-derivability + internal tamper-evidence only — NOT a completeness guarantee (no event withheld before commitment) and NOT A.6 control conformance.
